◎简　　介  

　　Over the last five years, an independent record shop has closed in the UK every three days. SOUND IT OUT is a portrait of the very last surviving vinyl record shop in Teesside, North East England, directed by an artist who grew up just three miles away. The film captures a cultural haven in one of the most deprived areas in the UK–a place that is thriving against the odds–and t...
